data.name: legal.privacy_intro
data.value: TuWasGutes only processes data required to operate the app.

data.name: legal.data_usage
data.value: usage data for completed or skipped actions

data.name: legal.data_realtime
data.value: technical connection data for real-time updates

data.name: legal.privacy_usage
data.value: The data is used solely to operate and improve TuWasGutes.

data.name: legal.external_disclaimer
data.value: TuWasGutes links to external websites and organizations. Their operators are solely responsible for their content, donation processes, and privacy practices.

data.name: legal.external_no_donations
data.value: TuWasGutes does not collect donations itself.
